meta.title: Tevi Troy on Fox and Friends Discussing Current Events
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Tevi Troy participated on a panel for Fox and Friends on February 16. Topics included the Muslim Brotherhood in Egypt and President Obama's budget.
